stories.title: UK releases new documents on ex-US envoy Mandelson

links.headline: UK releases new documents on ex-US envoy Mandelson
links.excerpt: Among the more than 1,000 pages of documents was a note from Peter Mandelson telling the UK foreign secretary at the time that the government would "never regret" giving him the job.

stories.title: Iran halts talks with US over Israeli strikes on Lebanon, state media reports

links.headline: Iranian media reports peace talks with US halted, as Trump says they continue at 'pace'
links.excerpt: Iranian state media is reporting that the country's government has halted negotiations with the United States over an end to the war in the Middle East, in protest over Israel's conduct in Lebanon.
links.imageAlt: Iranian media reports peace talks with US halted, as Trump says they continue at 'pace'

stories.imageAlt: Iranian media reports peace talks with US halted, as Trump says they continue at 'pace'

stories.title: Australia hits its highest number of billionaires on record. Do we need more?

links.headline: Australia hits its highest number of billionaires on record. Do we need more?
links.excerpt: Australia now has 178 billionaires who collectively hold more than $686 billion in wealth, sparking debate about the advantages and disadvantages of the growing number of ultra-wealthy.
links.imageAlt: Australia hits its highest number of billionaires on record. Do we need more?

stories.title: Paralyzed Senate: Majority no-shows at session after Estrada’s arrest

links.headline: Paralyzed Senate: Majority no-shows at session after Estrada's arrest
links.excerpt: Without a quorum — or at least 13 senators physically present — the Senate could not conduct business. Several important measures are left hanging.
